en: Oh her eyelids, her eyes make the stars look like they're not shining her hair

en: her hair falls perfectly without her trying she's so beautiful and I tell her every day

en: Yeah, I know, I know when I compliment her she won't believe me and it's so, it's so

en: that the paper she don't see what I see but every time she asks me do I look okay
zh: 她看不到我所看到的，但每次她問我我看起來還好嗎
ja: 彼女は私が見るものを見ていないけど、毎回彼女は私に「私、大丈夫？」と聞く

en: I say when I see your face there's not a thing that I would change

en: cuz you're amazing just the way you are and when you smile
